zh.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord Amington是Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex和Joan Burgeis的兒子，出生。他於1380年之前與Margaret Dallingridge結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1432年12月16日之前在英國，埋葬在英國素可貝哈姆。

zh-hans.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord Amington是Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex和Joan Burgeis的儿子，出生。他于1380年之前与Margaret Dallingridge结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1432年12月16日之前在英国，埋葬在英国素可貝哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord Amington was born as the son of Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex and Joan Burgeis. He married Margaret Dallingridge before 1380. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before 16 December 1432, in England, and was buried in Bayham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord Amington est né, fils de Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex et Joan Burgeis. Il a épousé Margaret Dallingridge avant 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant 16 décembre 1432, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à Bayham, Sussex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord AmingtonはAndrew Sackville Sheriff of SussexとJoan Burgeisの息子として生まれた。1380年以前にMargaret Dallingridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1432年12月16日以前にイギリスで死去し，イギリススセックスバイハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord Amington(은)는 Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex(와)과 Joan Burgeis의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1380년 이전 Margaret Dallingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1432년 12월 16일 이전 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 베이함에 묻혔다.

Ele faleceu antes 16 de dezembro de 1432, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Bayham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Sackville Lord Amington родился. Его родителей звали Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex и Joan Burgeis. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Dallingridge перед 1380 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед 16 декабрь 1432 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности беихам, суссекс, Англия.
